title: Solution Catalog
tagline: Outcomes you can buy — composed from the platform's products.

categories.name: Data Intelligence
categories.blurb: Turn scattered data into a trusted, unified view.

products.name: Customer 360 / CDP
products.tagline: One trusted view of every customer.
products.description: A Customer Data Platform: resolve identities across social and corporate IdPs into a unified, governed profile. Maps to the Gartner CDP market.
products.connects: Identity Fabric · Fabric DB · Knowledge Graph

products.name: Real-time Analytics
products.description: Dashboards and metrics that update the instant data changes, via live queries over the fabric.

products.name: Master Data Management
products.description: Canonical, deduplicated master records governed by policy across all source systems.
products.connects: Entity Registry · Governance Platform · Fabric DB

products.name: Entity Resolution
products.tagline: Link records that mean the same thing.
products.description: Probabilistic and deterministic matching to resolve duplicates across datasets — for risk, fraud, and 360 views.
products.connects: Identity Fabric · Knowledge Graph · Entity Registry

categories.name: Governance & Trust
categories.blurb: Prove compliance and trust your data by construction.

products.name: Data Governance & Compliance
products.description: Classify, govern, and prove compliance with policy enforced in the engine and an immutable audit trail.
products.connects: Governance Platform · Data Catalog · Fabric DB

products.name: Data Lineage & Audit
products.tagline: Trace every value to its source.
products.description: End-to-end, OpenLineage-compatible lineage with an immutable event log for audit and impact analysis.
products.connects: Data Observability · Fabric DB · Governance Platform

products.name: Access Audit / IAM Review
products.description: Audit every account, provider, and link for an identity — the AUDIT mode of the Identity Fabric.

categories.name: AI & Agents
categories.blurb: Ground AI and agents in governed knowledge.

products.name: Knowledge Graph & Search
products.description: A semantic knowledge graph with vector + graph search so people and agents find data by intent.
products.connects: Knowledge Graph · Semantic Search · Fabric DB

products.name: AI Agent Platform
products.description: Govern what agents can do (Capability) and why (Objective), with every action policy-gated and audited.
products.connects: Agent Runtime · Agent Governance · Agent Evals

products.name: Graph RAG / Grounded AI
products.description: Ground LLMs in the knowledge graph to reduce hallucination and trace answers to verified sources.
products.connects: Knowledge Graph · Semantic Search · Agent Runtime

products.name: Open Data Publishing
products.tagline: Share governed data with the world.
products.description: Publish discoverable, schema.org-native open datasets with provenance and licensing.
products.connects: Open Data World · Dataset Registry · Governance Platform

products.name: Data Marketplace & Exchange
products.description: A governed marketplace for licensed data products with usage policy and provenance enforced.
products.connects: Data Marketplace · Governance Platform · Fabric DB
